name: Taco Rice (with Beans)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan, combine all ingredients except rice and beans.
2. Bring the mixture to a boil over medium heat.
3. Stir in the rice and beans.
4. When the mixture boils again, stir, then reduce the heat to medium-low.
5. Cover and simmer until most of the liquid has cooked out, about 45 minutes to 1 hour.
6. Remove from heat and set aside covered for 5 minutes.
7. Mix well before serving.
